userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 3 Not possible in MW to specify an interpolated upfront stub with customized first fixng
MW id 19 Flows schedule can not be customized in Markitwire - period 0 / leg 1
MW id 1 Not possible in VCON to have Mutual breaks
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
Pay 0.3007% on fixed leg 100,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 3M on floating leg 88,540,943 Expiry 17 jun 2017
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
